name: Stacked Vertical with Weight-Shift Captions
description: BIZDRIVE-style vertical talking-head video: top frame is screen recording, bottom is face on a circle, with optional B-roll inserts in the top frame. Same stacked layout as Template 05 — the only difference is the caption system: Weight-Shift (caption-weightshift), minimal typography where the font-weight travels word-by-word — the currently-spoken word shifts to bold (700) + a slight scale, the rest stay light (300); gold tokens keep a persistent gold colour so keywords always pop. Adapted from the HyperFrames caption-weight-shift catalog component for Thai + 1080x1920. Uses the EV Car brand background (assets/bg.png).

layout.captionPosition: in the band below the bottom circle, bottom: 360px (build-weightshift-captions.py arg 4)

captions.fontSize: 78px, auto-fit down if a group overflows
captions.mechanic: font-weight travels word-by-word — at each word's start it shifts 300 -> 700 + scale 1.0 -> 1.08, then settles back to 300 as the next word takes over; the whole group fades up on enter and out on exit

colors.text: #ffffff (light/bold weight carries the emphasis, no box)
colors.gold: #f4c20f — gold tokens keep a persistent gold colour + soft gold glow so keywords always pop

captions.goldTokenRules: numbers, monetary figures, durations, brand/tech names, headline terms — these render gold (no box)
captions.perWordTiming: interpolated inside each group by character weight (caption-groups.json carries group start/end + token text+gold only)
captions.adaptedFrom: HyperFrames catalog component caption-weight-shift (npx hyperframes add caption-weight-shift) — ported from 1920x1080 English/Montserrat/lowercase to 1080x1920 Thai/IBM Plex Sans Thai, and from line-level to word-level weight travel

audio.polishChain: highpass80, lowpass12k, afftdn, agate, acompressor, loudnorm 2-pass, alimiter, apad

bgm.mixNote: mix BGM with ffmpeg amix normalize=0 so the voice keeps its polished level

broll.aiGenNote: B-roll fills the top frame (16:9-ish), not the whole screen — generate clips at 720p, 16:9, generate_audio false.

sfx.pacing: ~1 SFX per 12s of final video; fewer for clips under 60s
sfx.note: Every clip gets SFX but kept sparse — at most 5, each context-matched to the beat it lands on. mix-sfx.py enforces the rule and writes output/finals/final.mp4.

label.th: ตัดช่วงเงียบ (dead air)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 6 (Silero VAD); Step 7 ใช้แค่ rough EDL — คงจังหวะพูดเดิมไว้

label.th: ปรับแต่งเสียงพูด (polish)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 8 — ใช้เสียงดิบจาก visual master; Step 9 re-transcribe ใช้เสียงดิบแทน

label.th: ซับ / คำบรรยายไทย

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 9-11 ส่วน caption (re-transcribe, post-process subagent, build-*-captions.py); ไม่ mount caption track
ข้าม generate-broll + add-broll.py — ไม่มีภาพแทรก

label.th: จำนวนสูงสุด
เพลงประกอบ (BGM)

features.whenOff: mix-sfx.py ข้าม BGM — final.mp4 = speech (+ SFX) เท่านั้น

label.th: ระดับเสียง
เอฟเฟกต์เสียง (SFX)

features.whenOff: sfx-plan.json มี sfx: [] ว่าง — ไม่มีเอฟเฟกต์เสียง
ข้าม Step 16 — ส่งมอบ output/finals/final.mp4 โดยไม่ฝัง cover art

label.th: บรรทัดบน (ขาว)
บรรทัดเด่น (ทอง)
บรรทัดล่าง (ฟ้า)

pipeline.differenceFromTemplate05: Identical stacked layout (top screen frame + bottom face circle), motion, audio, B-roll and pipeline. Two changes: (1) Step 11 builds captions with scripts/build-weightshift-captions.py (word-by-word font-weight travel) instead of build-highlight-captions.py (karaoke box sweep); (2) the default background is the EV Car brand bg (assets/bg.png). The caption-groups.json schema is the same — all caption systems consume it.

reference.job: (none yet — first job will become the reference)
